15: Room temp 3-5 days, freeze for longer
20: Room temp until ripe, then fridge
26: Room temp until ripe, then fridge

recipes: Classic Egg Fried Rice

1. Cook rice and let cool (or use leftover rice)
2. Beat eggs in a bowl
3. Heat oil in a wok over high heat
4. Scramble eggs, set aside
5. Stir-fry rice for 2-3 minutes
6. Add soy sauce, toss well
7. Return eggs, mix through
8. Garnish with green onion
Simple Cheese Omelette

1. Whisk 3 eggs with a splash of milk
2. Melt butter in non-stick pan over medium heat
3. Pour in eggs, let set 1 minute
4. Sprinkle cheese on one half
5. Add mushrooms and spinach if using
6. Fold omelette in half
7. Cook 1 more minute until cheese melts
Garlic Butter Pasta

1. Cook pasta according to package directions
2. While pasta cooks, mince garlic
3. Melt butter with olive oil in a pan
4. Sauté garlic until fragrant (30 sec)
5. Toss drained pasta in the garlic butter
6. Season with salt, pepper, red pepper flakes
7. Top with cheese if using
Chicken Stir-Fry

1. Slice chicken breast into thin strips
2. Cut bell pepper and onion into strips
3. Heat oil in wok over high heat
4. Sear chicken 3-4 min until golden
5. Add vegetables, stir-fry 2-3 min
6. Add soy sauce and ginger
7. Toss until everything is coated
8. Serve over rice if desired
Tomato Egg Drop Soup

1. Dice tomatoes into chunks
2. Beat eggs in a bowl
3. Bring 2 cups water to boil
4. Add tomatoes, simmer 5 min
5. Slowly drizzle beaten eggs while stirring
6. Season with salt, dash of soy sauce
7. Garnish with green onion
8. Serve immediately
Avocado Toast with Egg

1. Toast bread until golden
2. Mash avocado with fork
3. Spread avocado on toast
4. Fry or poach egg
5. Place egg on avocado
6. Squeeze lemon juice over top
7. Season with salt, pepper, optional chili flakes
Black Bean Tacos

1. Warm black beans in a pan with cumin
2. Heat tortillas in dry pan or microwave
3. Slice avocado
4. Dice tomato if using
5. Assemble: beans, avocado, toppings on tortillas
6. Squeeze lime over each taco
7. Add cilantro and sour cream if desired
Overnight Oats

1. Combine oats and milk in jar
2. Slice banana, add to jar
3. Drizzle honey on top
4. Stir gently, seal jar
5. Refrigerate overnight (or at least 4 hours)
6. In morning, top with yogurt and apple slices if desired
7. Eat cold or microwave 1 min
One-Pot Chicken Rice

1. Dice chicken, onion, and carrot
2. Heat oil in pot, brown chicken 4-5 min
3. Add onion and garlic, sauté 2 min
4. Add rice, stir to coat
5. Add 2.5 cups water, bring to boil
6. Add carrots and peas if using
7. Reduce heat, cover, simmer 18-20 min
8. Fluff with fork
Caprese Salad

1. Slice tomatoes into rounds
2. Slice fresh mozzarella
3. Alternate tomato and cheese on plate
4. Drizzle with olive oil
5. Season with salt and pepper
6. Add fresh basil or spinach leaves
7. Serve immediately
Loaded Baked Potato

1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C)
2. Scrub potatoes, poke with fork
3. Rub with oil and salt
4. Bake 40-45 minutes until tender
5. Slice open, fluff insides with fork
6. Add butter, cheese, sour cream
7. Top with green onion and broccoli
Peanut Butter Banana Smoothie

1. Peel and break banana into chunks
2. Add peanut butter, milk, and honey to blender
3. Add oats if using for thickness
4. Blend until smooth
5. Pour into glass and serve immediately
Vegetable Stir-Fry with Tofu

1. Press tofu 10 min, cube
2. Chop broccoli and bell pepper
3. Heat oil in wok over high heat
4. Fry tofu until golden, 4-5 min per side
5. Remove tofu, add vegetables
6. Stir-fry vegetables 3-4 min
7. Return tofu, add soy sauce, ginger
8. Toss and serve over rice
Mediterranean Chickpea Salad

1. Drain and rinse chickpeas
2. Dice cucumber, tomato, and onion
3. Combine all vegetables in bowl
4. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon
5. Season with salt, pepper, cumin
6. Toss well
7. Serve at room temp or chilled
Simple Salmon with Veggies

1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C)
2. Place salmon fillets on baking sheet
3. Arrange broccoli (and sweet potato if using) around fish
4. Drizzle everything with olive oil
5. Squeeze lemon over salmon
6. Season with salt, pepper, garlic
7. Bake 15-18 minutes until fish flakes
Quick Tuna Salad

1. Drain canned tuna
2. Dice celery and onion finely
3. Combine in bowl
4. Squeeze lemon juice
5. Season with salt and pepper
6. Mix well
7. Serve on lettuce leaves or bread
Beef Taco Bowl

1. Brown ground beef in pan, drain fat
2. Season with cumin, salt, pepper
3. Warm rice and black beans
4. Dice tomato
5. Assemble bowls: rice, beef, beans, tomato
6. Top with cheese, sour cream, cilantro
7. Squeeze lime over top
Spinach Mushroom Scramble

1. Melt butter in non-stick pan
2. Slice mushrooms, sauté 3 min
3. Add spinach, cook until wilted
4. Beat eggs, pour into pan
5. Scramble gently over medium heat
6. Season with salt and pepper
7. Top with cheese if desired
Coconut Curry Vegetables

1. Dice potato and carrot
2. Heat oil in large pot
3. Add cumin, cook 30 seconds
4. Add potatoes and carrots, stir
5. Pour in coconut milk and 1/2 cup water
6. Simmer 15-18 min until tender
7. Add peas, cook 3 more min
8. Season and serve over rice
Sweet Potato & Black Bean Bowl

1. Peel and cube sweet potatoes
2. Toss with oil, cumin, salt
3. Roast at 400°F for 20-25 min
4. Warm black beans
5. Slice avocado
6. Assemble bowls: sweet potato, beans, avocado
7. Squeeze lime, add cilantro
8. Serve over rice if desired
Classic French Toast

1. Beat eggs with milk in shallow bowl
2. Add pinch of cinnamon if desired
3. Heat butter in pan over medium heat
4. Dip bread slices in egg mixture
5. Cook each side 2-3 min until golden
6. Top with banana slices and honey
7. Serve warm
Garlic Lemon Chicken

1. Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper
2. Mince garlic
3. Heat olive oil in oven-safe pan
4. Sear chicken 4 min each side
5. Add garlic, cook 30 seconds
6. Squeeze lemon over chicken
7. Transfer to 375°F oven for 10-12 min
8. Rest 5 min before slicing
Mushroom Risotto

1. Dice onion, slice mushrooms, mince garlic
2. Heat butter in large pan
3. Sauté onion 3 min, add mushrooms 4 min
4. Add garlic, cook 30 sec
5. Add rice, stir to coat 1 min
6. Add warm water 1/2 cup at a time, stirring
7. Continue adding water and stirring 18-20 min
8. Stir in cheese, season
Egg & Veggie Breakfast Wrap

1. Beat eggs, scramble in pan
2. Dice bell pepper, sauté briefly
3. Warm tortilla in dry pan
4. Layer: eggs, peppers, spinach, cheese
5. Add sour cream if desired
6. Roll up tightly, tucking in sides
7. Cut in half and serve
Banana Oat Pancakes

1. Mash bananas thoroughly with fork
2. Mix in oats and beaten eggs
3. Let batter sit 5 min
4. Heat butter/oil in pan over medium
5. Pour small pancakes (1/4 cup each)
6. Cook 2-3 min per side until golden
7. Drizzle with honey if desired
